testcase.name: Accessibility › should support keyboard navigation through verses
Accessibility › should have proper focus indicators
Accessibility › should have proper ARIA labels on interactive elements
Accessibility › should have proper heading hierarchy
Accessibility › should have proper lang attribute on page
Accessibility › should have meaningful alt text on images
Accessibility › should support Enter key activation on buttons
Accessibility › should maintain color contrast ratios
Audio Functionality › should show play button for verses
Audio Functionality › should display audio player when play is triggered
Audio Functionality › should have accessible audio controls
Audio Functionality › should support keyboard shortcuts for audio
Bookmarking Functionality › should display bookmark buttons on verses
Bookmarking Functionality › should toggle bookmark state when clicked
Bookmarking Functionality › should persist bookmarks in localStorage
Bookmarking Functionality › should navigate to bookmarks page or sidebar
Bookmarking Functionality › should show bookmarked verses in bookmarks view
Navigation and Verse Display › should navigate to surah and display verses
Navigation and Verse Display › should display surah information correctly
Navigation and Verse Display › should navigate between consecutive surahs
Navigation and Verse Display › should support direct URL navigation to any surah
Navigation and Verse Display › should handle invalid surah gracefully
Performance › should load surah page within acceptable time
Performance › should render verses efficiently with virtual scrolling
Performance › should handle navigation between surahs quickly
Performance › should cache assets for faster subsequent loads
Performance › should not have memory leaks with repeated navigation
Performance › should load web fonts efficiently
Performance › should measure First Contentful Paint
Responsive Design › should display correctly on Mobile (375x812)
Responsive Design › should display correctly on Tablet (768x1024)
Responsive Design › should display correctly on Desktop (1280x800)
Responsive Design › should show mobile navigation on small screens
Responsive Design › should have touch-friendly button sizes on mobile
Responsive Design › should adapt audio player for mobile viewport
Responsive Design › should stack content vertically on narrow screens
Search Functionality › should display search input
Search Functionality › should navigate to search page
Search Functionality › should show results when searching for common term
Search Functionality › should highlight searched term in results
Search Functionality › should navigate to verse when clicking search result
Translation Functionality › should display translation alongside Arabic text
Translation Functionality › should toggle translation visibility
Translation Functionality › should access translation settings
Translation Functionality › should display both Arabic and English text together
Translation Functionality › should persist translation preference
